THE SPRING SALE

UP TO 30% OFF

A fresh season calls for a fresh space, save on furniture that just makes sense.

Shop Sale

SMARTER BY DESIGN

We Fixed What Furniture Gets Wrong

Modular pieces that adapt as your life evolves. Engineered for comfort, with smart solutions built in. Delivered in days, not months.

25% Off Modular Seating

25% Off Sleeper Sofas

Outdoor Essentials

Storage

Dining

Up to 70% Off Clearance

When it comes to furniture, we rethought everything - starting with modularity.

Our modular components arrive in cleverly packed, easy-to-assemble sections that fit through even the tightest spaces and grow with you. Even better, they show up in days, not months.

THIS JUST IN

New Outdoor Has Arrived

Meet the latest additions to our outdoor collections. More dynamic, more adaptable, and more indulgent.

SHOP OUTDOOR

MODULAR FUNCTIONALITY

Pieces that adapt, move, and grow with you.

SERIOUSLY COMFORTABLE

Cushions engineered for every lounge style -- from supportive to sink-in.

SMART DESIGN

From hidden storage to truly comfortable sleeper sofas, every detail solves a real problem.

SPEED OF DELIVERY

Get your new furniture in as little as a week.

Furniture Designed for modern life at home

Union Sofa

Don't just take it from us!

Burrow’s Union sectional is too damn comfortable, with cushions that are deep and plush. It’s a magnet for anyone looking to relax.
Span Sleeper Sofa

Don't just take it from us!

It's supportive both in sitting and sleeping mode, and it'll make your overnight guests feel like royalty. We honestly can't stop bragging about it…
Nomad Loveseat

Don't just take it from us!

Burrow’s Nomad Loveseat is so comfortable and chic that it’ll make you a modular couch convert.

Fast, affordable shipping

Unlike other furniture brands, we keep inventory on hand thanks to our modular design—so your order is delivered in days, not months. And it arrives in normal shipping boxes, not expensive freight.
